ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country belongs to */,
  "country_code_alpha2" TEXT /* Two-letter country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) */,
  "country_code_alpha3" TEXT /* Three-letter country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancy" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data belongs to */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy value */,
  "life_expectancy_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the life expectancy value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the life expectancy value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the data source */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* Publication URL of the data source */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization or affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., data, report, visualization) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of the rule (e.g., data quality, data integrity) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the rule (e.g., warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., completeness, consistency) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_governance" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of the policy (e.g., data sharing, data security) */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., draft, active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agreement */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the agreement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the agreement */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* Type of the agreement (e.g., data use agreement, data sharing agreement) */,
  "agreement_status" TEXT /* Status of the agreement (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_security" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of the measure (e.g., access control, data encryption) */,
  "measure_status" TEXT /* Status of the measure (e.g., implemented, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_backup" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date when the backup was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the backup */,
  "backup_type" TEXT /* Type of the backup (e.g., full, incremental) */,
  "backup_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the backup (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_recovery" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the recovery was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recovery */,
  "recovery_type" TEXT /* Type of the recovery (e.g., point-in-time recovery, disaster recovery) */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Status of the recovery (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_archiving" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archive */,
  "archive_date" TEXT /* Date when the archive was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the archive */,
  "archive_type" TEXT /* Type of the archive (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Retention period of the archive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id")
)
